generated: Warranty story generated — tap Audit Story when ready for MI scoring
generatedRevision: Story improved with tech details — tap Audit Story to refresh the score
roNotLoaded: Repair order not loaded — go back and reopen the line
lineNotFound: Repair line not found — refresh the RO and try again
clearCustomerPayFirst: Clear Customer Pay mode first to generate a warranty story with AI.
scoreWaitGenerate: Wait for story generation to finish before auditing
scoreNeedStory: Generate or write a warranty story before running the audit
scoreCompleteReopen: Audit complete — reopen the repair line to view the score
scoreStale: Story changed during audit — run Audit Story again.
scoreCustomerPaySkip: Customer Pay stories skip AI audit — edit the text if needed.
reviewCompleteReopen: Review complete — reopen the repair line to view feedback
reviewWaitAudit: Wait for the audit to finish before running a full review
reviewWaitGenerate: Wait for story generation to finish before reviewing
reviewCustomerPaySkip: Customer Pay stories skip AI review — edit the text if needed.
reviewNeedStory: Write or generate a warranty story before reviewing
reviewStale: Story changed during review — run the review again.
cpApplyFailed: Failed to apply Customer Pay template
cpCleared: Customer Pay mode cleared — warranty AI generation is available
cpClearFailed: Failed to clear Customer Pay mode
complianceHintNotAudited: Run Audit Story before certifying or copying to CDK.
complianceHintAudited: Review the score, then certify when ready.
complianceHintStale: The story changed since the last audit — re-run Audit Story.
complianceHintCertified: Story is certified and ready for CDK copy.
qualityStaleBody: The story changed after the last audit. Run Audit Story to refresh the score.
certDisclaimer: I certify that I have personally reviewed this warranty narrative, that it accurately reflects the work performed and diagnostic findings, and that I accept full responsibility for its content before submission.
certCheckbox: I have reviewed and verify this story is accurate
certPendingReaudit: Re-run Audit Story before certifying — the narrative changed.
certSaveHint: Check the box and enter your name, then tap Save.
cpNoCertify: Customer Pay stories do not require certification
generateUnavailable: Story generation is unavailable — refresh and try again
